html:
Exclusive to:

The Fryfocals are a Character-specific Hat Item craftable by Wagstaff through the Tinkering Tab. They are crafted with Spectoggles and a Red Gem.

Fryfocals can be used to damage Mobs whilst igniting them. Be wary as the fire can spread to other flammable objects if the mob is near. Similar to the other goggles, they remove nearsightedness from Wagstaff, but also give the world a sepia tint. For any other character besides Wagstaff, the Fryfocals will still make the world sepia-toned, but cannot launch fireballs and will only blur vision.

Tips

  • Since the Fryfocals only degrade when a fireball is shot and lack the Visor's FOV restriction, they can be sustained indefinitely to counteract Wagstaff's myopia with minimal drawbacks.
  • Using the Fryfocals while wet will shock Wagstaff twice, dealing a total of 16 damage (affected by armor); all lightning insulating clothes such as Rain Coat and Snakeskin Jacket cannot prevent the shock damage.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Fryfocals
"Static boom focusing apparatus."

Tab

50
(37.5 )

Perk
Removes blurriness.
Damages and ignites Mobs.
Prevents slowdown from Heavy Fog when body slot items equipped.
"gogglesshoothat"
“It's a... goggle thing.”
–Wilson, when examining the Fryfocals
“These would be better if they worked.”
–Willow, when examining the Fryfocals
“Wolfgang doesn't know what this is.”
–Wolfgang, when examining the Fryfocals
“The world looks like the photographs of Abigail I have.”
–Wendy, when examining the Fryfocals
“NON-FUNCTIONING. THIS MUST BE WHAT THE FLESHSACKS CALL "REGRET"”
–WX-78, when examining the Fryfocals
“I do like this particular shade of sepia.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining the Fryfocals
“Don't think it's working.”
–Woodie, when examining the Fryfocals
“If they worked, I might consider wearing these.”
–Maxwell, when examining the Fryfocals
“Tiny spheres of static energy make a marvelous flaming projectile.”
–Wagstaff, when examining the Fryfocals
“It is öf nö use tö me.”
–Wigfrid, when examining the Fryfocals
“We can pretend they work. Pew! Pew!”
–Webber, when examining the Fryfocals
“I don't get it.”
–Walani, when examining the Fryfocals
“Are those potatoes?”
–Warly, when examining the Fryfocals
“Nary a use in sight.”
–Woodlegs, when examining the Fryfocals
“GIVE WILBA A SEA OF SEE TROUBLES”
–Wilba, when examining the Fryfocals
“Can't use”
–Wormwood, when examining the Fryfocals
“Oh I get what this is for! Oh wait, no I don't.”
–Wheeler, when examining the Fryfocals
The Fryfocals are a Character-specific Hat Item craftable by Wagstaff through the Tinkering Tab. They are crafted with Spectoggles and a Red Gem.
Fryfocals can be used to damage Mobs whilst igniting them. Be wary as the fire can spread to other flammable objects if the mob is near. Similar to the other goggles, they remove nearsightedness from Wagstaff, but also give the world a sepia tint. For any other character besides Wagstaff, the Fryfocals will still make the world sepia-toned, but cannot launch fireballs and will only blur vision.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Since the Fryfocals only degrade when a fireball is shot and lack the Visor's FOV restriction, they can be sustained indefinitely to counteract Wagstaff's myopia with minimal drawbacks.
Using the Fryfocals while wet will shock Wagstaff twice, dealing a total of 16 damage (affected by armor); all lightning insulating clothes such as Rain Coat and Snakeskin Jacket cannot prevent the shock damage.
